prefixes.description: Map of prefix token (e.g. gd_req) to human-readable description.

id_regex.description: Default regex pattern that all IDs must match (except those covered by id_regex_exceptions).

separator.description: Separator token inserted between prefix and local-part (typically '__').

id_regex_exceptions.description: Per-prefix regex overrides. Keys must be prefixes declared in the prefixes map.
